scripts.build: npm run lint:timeline && npm run build -w @frontend-notes-lab/docs && node scripts/write-assets-ignore.mjs
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build && npm run dev -w @frontend-notes-lab/worker
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy -w @frontend-notes-lab/worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @frontend-notes-lab/docs && npm run typecheck -w @frontend-notes-lab/worker
